locale_default.comment: ar, ur, en - which locale uses this as default

is_public.comment: Whether challenge is visible to all users

ayah_id.comment: Optional ayah reference for the challenge

end_date.comment: Expected end date based on duration

days_completed.comment: Number of days user has completed

notes.comment: User's personal notes for this challenge

count_completed.comment: Number of times completed today. For ONCE_DAILY: 0 or 1. For MULTIPLE_DAILY: actual count (e.g., 3/5)

is_completed.comment: True if daily target met (ONCE_DAILY: count >= 1, MULTIPLE_DAILY: count >= target_count_per_day)

reference_id.comment: ID of related entity (session, reflection, etc)

reference_type.comment: Type of reference (session, reflection, quiz, etc)

last_weekly_grant.comment: Last date weekly cards were granted

constraints.name: tafsir_insights_confidence_range
constraints.expression: confidence IS NULL OR (confidence >= 0 AND confidence <= 1)

shared_at.comment: When challenge was shared to this community
When quiz was shared to this community
When reflection was shared to this community

card_id.comment: ID of the reflection, challenge, or quiz

card_owner_id.comment: User ID who created the card — denormalized for fast filtering

word_or_phrase.comment: Verbatim Arabic word/phrase extracted from the source text

batch_id.comment: Groups records from the same LLM batch call

meta.comment: Raw LLM response and any extra data

constraints.name: ghareeb_word_occurrences_source_check
constraints.expression: (source_type = 'ayah' AND ayah_id IS NOT NULL AND knowledge_point_id IS NULL) OR (source_type = 'knp' AND knowledge_point_id IS NOT NULL AND ayah_id IS NULL)

token.comment: Unique opaque token embedded in the shareable URL

resource_type.comment: Type of resource being shared e.g. knp, challenge, community, paid_invite

resource_id.comment: ID of the resource. Null for non-content links like paid_invite.

redeemed_at.comment: Only used for paid_invite — marks when the invitee redeemed the link.

meta.comment: Extra data: open_count, inviter name snapshot, etc.

redeemed_by_id.comment: Only populated for paid_invite on redemption.

llm_generated_text.comment: Raw definition generated by LLM from the top 3 KNP candidates

final_text.comment: Admin approved/edited version — this is what gets shown to the user

source_knp_ids.comment: Array of KNP IDs used to generate this definition e.g. [4060, 4063, 4061]

custom_text.comment: Admin-edited version of the definition for this specific occurrence. Null means copied as-is.

is_custom.comment: False = definition copied as-is from source. True = admin edited before applying.
